long_description: David (CEO & Co-Founder) is an ex staff software engineer and engineering manager from Coinbase. Over the past 4 years, David has been focused on building and evangelizing eng platforms to help Coinbase product engineers move faster + scale Coinbase to the next billion users. When he left, the teams that he helped build/lead powered 95% of UI at Coinbase, 65% of Coinbase edge traffic and were used by more than 700 engineers daily.

name: Everest
long_description: Cofounder @ Everest | Ex-Netflix, Twitter Ads, DoorDash, Stanford Research

name: Expected Parrot
one_liner: Simulate your customers with AI agents
long_description: Expected Parrot helps companies simulate their customers with AI agents to explore pricing, product, marketing, communications and other scenarios at scale. Our open-source library and no-code web app let you design custom agent personas and conduct interviews and surveys with them using LLMs of your choice to generate results and reports. Everything is cached and reproducible, and you can send the same surveys to human respondents to validate results in the same interface.

name: Imagine AI
one_liner: We reverse engineer B2B growth, starting with LinkedIn.
long_description: Imagine AI is a research and software company reverse engineering modern B2B growth, starting with LinkedIn. We build coordinated content systems for executive teams, where the CEO, VP of Sales, and Head of Marketing post aligned narratives from a single calendar, producing compounding reach that single-founder posting cannot reach. 50+ B2B companies are now using Imagine AI, including MongoDB, Rippling, Slash, and Corgi Insurance. Customers have generated $31M in attributed revenue, 12M impressions, and 1,400 hours of executive time saved.

name: Anto Biosciences
one_liner: A Foundation Model for Microbial Communities.
long_description: Our foundational work spans high-performance genomic analysis [1-4], metagenomic classification algorithms [5,9,14,15], in-storage computing for microbiome data [6-8], and the first large-scale datasets for causal modeling of microbial ecosystems [11,12]. We've pioneered techniques that make microbial communities computationally tractable, including quality-aware sparsification that reduces noise by 99% while preserving predictive power [5,9,15]. Our recent work on therapeutic resistance [10] and AI-controlled metagenomics for clinical applications [14] directly informs our drug optimization capabilities.

name: Patent Watch
one_liner: AI for detecting patent infringements
long_description: We automate patent infringement detection. Our software interprets patents, identifies competing products, and generates claim charts showing who’s infringing and how. Teams use us to: - Find licensing and litigation targets - Send cease-and-desist letters - Find counter litigation - Sell IP in wind-downs - Accelerate M&A diligence We also run AI invalidity and prior-art searches to help your patents hold up in court. Companies spend up to $50k to file and maintain a single patent over its lifetime, but once it's granted, they let it collect dust. With Patent Watch, you can start turning your patent portfolio into revenue in 10 minutes.

name: s2.dev
one_liner: API for unlimited, durable, real-time streams
long_description: S2 is an API for durable streams. We make working with streaming data dead simple and reliable. The more we worked on data systems, the more we felt like there was a missing building block. The seamless experience of object storage simply did not exist for durable streams – so we set out to fix that! S2 reimagines streams as an unlimited and access-controlled web resource. Like if Kafka and S3 had a baby. - Building agents? Use granular streams to persist context in real time, make workflows auditable, and coordinate between agents. - Publishing fast-moving data? Streams support high fanout and can be accessed directly over the internet, so they are a great fit for broadcasting real-time feeds. - Sandboxing? Emit to per-instance streams, and read history or live events just as easily. - Local-first and multiplayer experiences? Propagate updates reliably and efficiently. Stop dealing with clusters, and start streaming.

name: Tornyol
one_liner: We build micro-drones that kill mosquitoes.
long_description: We send an ultrasonic pulse using a regular ultrasonic transmitter (the one you can find in the HC-SR04 arduino modules, or on cark park assist sensors) then listen for the echoes using an array of smartphone microphones. This phased array of smartphone microphone allows us to get a directional recording of all echoes in the scene. To classify the echoes, we plot a spectrogram of the echoes as a function of time. Whenever a mosquito beats its wings, the movement produces irregular doppler effect. By measuring that alternating doppler effect, we get a 2D image that’s unique to each mosquito. We then detect the species and sex of the target we have in front of us. Here’s what these signatures look like.

name: Nucleo
one_liner: The first Agentic platform for Oncology
long_description: I am a researcher in Applied Mathematics and AI for healthcare by training. I hold degrees from Politecnico di Milano, Italy (BSc) and EPFL, Switzerland (MSc and PhD), and have conducted research at the Stanford School of Medicine during my PhD and as a Postdoc. Before founding Nucleo, I was part of Apple Health AI, where I worked on physics-informed machine learning. I've published papers on computational methods, cardiovascular system modeling, and AI for medical images and optical sensors.

name: Leadbay
one_liner: Qualify millions of Data-Signal-Scarce leads that couldn't be found…
long_description: Leadbay qualifies leads for agentic workflows. Teams at L'Oréal, Saint-Gobain, Gerflor USA, Corgi, and Nespresso B2B have 3x'd their addressable market and 10x'd what they defined as "qualified leads". Talking to our customers, we used to hear, "10 minutes on Leadbay beats 6 months with Clay and a GTM agency." Co-founders are Milan Stankovic (CTO) - PhD to make AI work with limited data, and Ludovic Granger (CEO). Create an account. A new market is yours. leadbay.ai.

name: Pixley AI
one_liner: The first platform where families can create AI cartoons in minutes
long_description: Pixley turns kids' drawings and ideas into fully animated cartoons – in minutes. Kids are natural storytellers. With Pixley, any kid can draw a character, describe a world, and watch their story come to life as a personalized animated cartoon. Most kids' screen time is broken: passive, algorithmic content designed to keep kids watching, not growing. Pixley is the antidote. Every episode is safe, ad-free, and built around Social-Emotional Learning (SEL). Parents can choose any lesson they want to teach their child, and Pixley weaves it naturally into the story their kids create. We're building the creative platform for the next generation – where kids are the directors, not just the audience. Additionally, the same technology powers Pixley Studios, our B2B content service for brands and content creators who want to produce high-quality AI video without the cost or time of traditional production. We’re 19 year old CS dropouts who’ve known each other since elementary school and won 4 hackathons at 15. After seeing AI flood the internet with low-quality content, we created Pixley – a safe, personalized way for kids to turn their ideas into animated stories.

name: Cortex AI
one_liner: Large-scale real-world robot & human data for embodied AI
long_description: Cortex AI builds the world’s most diverse and large-scale real-world workplace robot & egocentric dataset — where the physical world becomes the next training and evaluation set for embodied AI. We power frontier labs developing robotics foundation models and general-purpose robots by providing the data they need: 1️⃣ Egocentric Data — real-workplace human video with hand/body pose, depth, and subtask labels. 2️⃣ Robot Data — trajectories collected from manipulators and humanoids in real industry settings. 3️⃣ Human-in-the-Loop Rollouts & Evals — real-world deployments with remote operators who recover robots when they fail, capturing data that feeds back into training and continuously improves models. Additionally, through the Cortex Marketplace, workplaces get paid to host data-collection and evaluation sessions, while labs access the in-the-wild data that truly matters. This draws on Lucas’s previous experience as co-founder of Carousell, a C2C marketplace that scaled to a $1B+ valuation.

name: Sol
one_liner: Code and browse in the same place
long_description: Sol is a browser where developers can orchestrate agents from their tabs. Ship 100x from a single place where agents can see, navigate, and act on your workspace.

name: Thesis
one_liner: Autonomous AI research
long_description: Computational science still runs on tools built for a pre-AI world. Software where researchers analyze data and make discoveries, were never designed for automation. Today’s coding agents can write code, but don’t understand the data they’re acting on. Scientists end up doing manual, fragile, error-prone work. We felt this pain firsthand across our time in AI R&D and saw the same gap everywhere: researchers have no infrastructure to automate experimentation or extend their capabilities. Thesis solves this by bringing data-aware AI agents directly into the scientific environment: virtual teammates who monitor experiments, analyze results, surface insights from the literature, and run background workflows safely and reliably, turning discovery into an assisted and continuously improving process.

name: Oxus
one_liner: AI-powered automation for internal audit workflows
long_description: Oxus automates internal audits for pre-IPO and public companies using AI. Companies including leading payroll providers and public biotech companies work with us to streamline audit workflows and get audits done 10x faster. Learn more at: https://www.oxus-ai.com/

name: Play Health
one_liner: Perimenopause Care Platform
long_description: Play Health is building a perimenopause care platform to provide women and their providers with the tools they need to relieve symptoms fast. It is led by technical, second-time, YC-backed founders Andrea Mazzocchi, PhD and Ian Miller, with an exit and a unicorn between them. Over 30 million women in the U.S. are experiencing perimenopause symptoms, spending an estimated $15B+ annually on symptom management. Despite this most only receive generic solutions and struggle to find effective symptom relief. We're bringing evidence-based perimenopause care to women through partnerships with medical practices and employer and health benefits programs. Our platform integrates personalized symptom, medication, and lifestyle data to generate AI-powered insights and clinical protocols, enabling providers to deliver specialized care. Every clinical interaction enriches our longitudinal dataset allowing us to create better outcomes for patients, deeper insights for providers, and expand into women’s health broadly. This also enables us to partner with pharma and biotech companies developing therapeutics and diagnostics for women's health.

name: Casey
one_liner: Casey is an AI-native commercial insurance brokerage
long_description: The first wave of insurtech largely focussed on automating smaller, simpler risks. Casey is built for the complex, high-premium business that actually drives revenue. This automation infrastructure enables clients to receive policies in a matter of days, compared to what now takes >1 month.

name: Selfin
one_liner: Building the first AI Bank
long_description: Your money is scattered across different apps that don’t talk to each other, leading to bad rates, high fees, and poor financial choices. If you actually want to manage your finances properly, you end up juggling budgeting tools, spreadsheets, and hours of research.

name: Compyle
one_liner: The coding agent that actually collaborates with you
long_description: Compyle is a less autonomous coding agent that asks before it acts. We're like Cursor or Claude Code - but you won't need to rewrite your codebase every time you use it for more than a small task. We built Compyle because we were frustrated with the direction other coding agents are headed. They're all racing to be more autonomous, running for hours without human input. This doesn't work for real production code. When agents run autonomously, they make countless small decisions that pile up in your codebase. Engineers lose ownership - they don't know what was implemented, can't effectively debug or maintain it, and struggle to build on top of it. The code becomes a black box, and they're forced to throw it away. Compyle keeps engineers in the driver's seat.

name: Lexi
one_liner: AI Operating System for Legal Teams
long_description: Lexi is an AI operating system for legal teams, law firms, and in-house counsel. It brings legal research, drafting, document review, contract redlining, case workflows, translation, knowledge management, and AI associates into one secure platform. Lexi is built for enterprise legal work with end-to-end security, role-based access controls, audit trails, encrypted document handling, private workspaces, and deployment options for sensitive legal environments. Legal teams use Lexi to process high-volume legal documents, find answers with verified citations, draft in their preferred style, review contracts, and manage legal workflows from intake to output. Lexi has processed 5,000,000+ documents across 200,000+ cases for 200+ organizations and law firms, helping lawyers save 10+ hours every week and handle more matters without adding headcount.

name: Codyco
one_liner: The AI Reservation Team for Hotel Groups
long_description: €5,000 in additional bookings. In 4 weeks. For a 53-room hotel. We help hotel groups turn missed calls into bookings. This it how it works: - They send their missed calls to us. - Our AI answers and takes the booking. - The booking goes right into their PMS. Even with call centers and central reservation departments they are still losing 5% of calls. That is a seven figure revenue leak. Why us? We used to build software that can’t fail for massive companies. We started Codyco after a friend told us how much money he was losing from missed calls. We built the first version just for him. Now we give hotel groups the reliable AI they need, so they never lose a booking on the phone again.

name: ComplyDo
one_liner: Global Compliance for Enterprises
long_description: Enterprises face an explosion of global regulations and standards. ISO, PIPL, NIS2, PCI, DORA, and many more. Due to this complexity, compliance, legal, and audit teams still handle most of the work manually or through consultants: mapping requirements, reviewing policies, collecting evidence, and maintaining spreadsheets. It’s slow, expensive, and limits how fast companies can move.

name: Bravi
one_liner: The AI operating system powering home services businesses
long_description: Bravi is building the AI operating system for home-services businesses, using AI-powered customer communication as the wedge. We replace the front office (calls, chats, follow-ups) with AI agents that never miss a lead, then layer an internal AI copilot that understands products, pricing, and technical documentation. We started with fenestration (shutters, windows, garage doors), a large, complex vertical with no modern software, before expanding to adjacent trades. Bravi is already live with leading installers and manufacturers across Europe and the US, turning missed demand into revenue.

name: FinalDose
one_liner: Programmable DNA drug destroying all cancers, unlocking 80% of targets
long_description: Founder at FinalDose (YC P26). DPhil in Biochemistry from Oxford, where he spent 5 years as a postdoctoral researcher at the MRC Weatherall Institute of Molecular Medicine. Led CRISPR screening projects uncovering new druggable targets in cancer cells and built pipelines reducing hit validation time from months to 7 days. Research focuses on BRCA1-deficient cancers and PARP inhibitor resistance mechanisms.

name: Sunflower
one_liner: Building the Sobriety Platform for the future of Superintelligence. 🌻
long_description: Sunflower is on a mission to create one trillion days sober. Our product is both a consumer app (think a "Duolingo for addiction") but also with a tele-therapy clinic inside. Consumer App: - We built the #1 AI Sponsor for any kind of addiction - Beautiful visual progression tracking to power the core "task to be done" of addiction - A twitter style social media for addicts - DIY learn content (think Masterclass for addiction) for all major addiction types - CBT based journaling exercises Tele-Therapy: - Think a "Early Medical Peter Attia" quality of clinic, but completely focused on addiction - Starting with talk therapy in CA & TX we're rolling out to all 50 states + MAT - Bringing together the worlds best doctors to create the most effective protocol for addiction Sunflower went from 0 - 100k MAU in less than 6 months, and now we're continuing the traction to create the #1 product for addiction for the 1.2B humans on this planet that struggle with this fundamental human problem.

name: Captain
one_liner: Give AI agents accurate knowledge search that scales
long_description: Captain delivers the most accurate file search engine built for AI agents. We’ll index data from the sources folks already use like S3, SharePoint, and Google Drive, and easily scale multimodal, petabyte-level content search. We’re the Snowflake for Unstructured Data. Captain tops the Open-RAG-Benchmark with over 20% higher accuracy than standard RAG pipelines. We achieve this through robust data processing techniques like embedding normalization across modalities, ensuring that representations cluster by semantic content rather than data type.

name: Redapto
one_liner: Enterprise AI Transformation Platform
long_description: At Coinbase, Anirudh built internal agent infrastructure, with some automations now saving over $2.5M per year. Cheril worked on fine-tuning, model compression, and distillation at Adobe and Amazon Science, saving over $1M and improving system latency by 20×.

name: Helonic
one_liner: Automatic Construction Drawing Clash Detection
long_description: We help construction teams eliminate rework, delays, and drawing confusion before construction starts. We analyze PDF plans, detect clashes and inconsistencies across disciplines, and create draft RFIs so teams can resolve issues early. This saves construction companies hundreds of hours and millions of dollars. What we do: - Automatically detect clashes, missing information, and drawing mismatches - Align architectural, structural, and MEP plans so everything matches across sheets - Generate draft RFIs from issues we find - Replace long page-turn meetings with instant drawing analysis - Reduce rework and prevent schedule delays before boots hit the ground We integrate with: Procore, Autodesk, email, and the tools teams already use Teams use us to: - Save hundreds of thousands to millions of dollars per project - Catch design and coordination issues early - Reduce RFIs and prevent field fixes - Keep projects on schedule with fewer surprises Contact us at founders@usearticulate.com

name: Aleph Lab
one_liner: AI language buddy in the games kids love
long_description: All four of us are immigrants who know how hard it is to learn a new language. To help kids facing the same challenge, we tutored English for years. It was hard to keep kids engaged with flashcards and textbooks. But, when we joined them in Minecraft and spoke only in English, they naturally absorbed new words and phrases.

name: Logical
one_liner: A proactive desktop copilot. Clippy, but actually good.
long_description: Logical is a desktop AI that acts as a proactive and largely promptless copilot, designed to reduce the friction of using AI for everyday tasks. It transfers context across apps, and allows taking action on many apps with just a few clicks. Logical can assist with drafting emails, writing docs, noting meetings and can even automatically detect action items. Need to prompt? Logical can understand intent in much fewer words than a regular chatbot. Plus, user data is never sent to Logical servers. Logical is the AI resurrection of Clippy, but actually good.

name: Agentic Fabriq
one_liner: The control plane for AI agents.
long_description: Agentic Fabriq helps companies securely manage what AI agents can access and do across business tools, data, and teams. We give each agent an identity, scoped permissions, approval flows, and audit logs, so employees and customer-facing workflows can use agents without relying on shared API keys, overbroad service accounts, or one-off integrations.

name: Travo
one_liner: The data infrastructure for real estate
long_description: By using AI to aggregate data accurately and modularly across asset types at scale, we unlock deeper coverage and access to untapped markets and proprietary data sources. One boutique PE firm found an off-market RV park now under purchase for 3M+. Another $200B+ fund cut market analysis and underwriting from weeks to days, while increasing revenue across its portfolio.

name: Tensr
one_liner: Fully autonomous robotic factories
long_description: Moving fast in manufacturing today doesn't exist. Iterating designs for manufacturing takes months of back and forth getting samples from China and pre-ordering manufacturing capacity several months before the holiday rush, only then to wait several weeks for shipping praying there isn't a strike at the docks. At the same time we see the complete collapse of America industrial capacity as American workers and experience leave the field and contracts are sent overseas.

name: Kestrel AI
one_liner: AI Agents for Platform Engineering
long_description: Kestrel is the AI automation layer for platform engineering teams. Platform teams use Kestrel to automate incident response, cloud provisioning, CI/CD, security, and developer requests across their stack. Kestrel turns natural-language prompts into deterministic, production-ready workflows with 25+ integrations, 140+ pre-built actions, and support for custom HTTP and webhook actions. Developer-first, with a CLI, Python SDK, and MCP server to manage workflows from where platform teams already work.

name: LogosGuard
one_liner: The sensitive data redaction layer for AI
long_description: SOC-2 wasn’t designed for AI. Without the right controls in place, enterprises are having to rely on outdated standards or navigate a fragmented landscape of nascent AI frameworks (think NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, and CSA AICM). The result: slow approvals for new projects and vendors, inconsistent and insufficient reviews, and no reliable way to prove an AI product still meets policy after it changes.

name: Sciloop
one_liner: Expert STEM reasoning data for frontier AI labs.
long_description: Sciloop creates expert-level math and physics problems that frontier AI models can't solve, then sells the data to AI labs for training and evaluation. Our problems are created by IPhO and IMO medalists — the top 0.01% of STEM talent globally. On our benchmark, models like GPT 5.4 Pro and Gemini 3.1 Pro score 0-5% on our hardest problems. We work with AI labs to supply continuous, fresh training data that pushes the frontier of mathematical and scientific reasoning. Founded by Bilal and Osman, International Physics Olympiad medalists from MIT with hands-on ML research experience at MIT CSAIL.

name: Multifactor
one_liner: Zero-trust authentication, authorization, and auditing for AI agents
long_description: The agentic era is here, but its foundation is dangerously insecure. A growing number of high-profile "AI agent gone rogue" security incidents make headlines each week. As enterprise adoption of agentic software has far outpaced the development of applicable cybersecurity solutions, CISOs have loudly voiced a growing need for verifiable, fine-grained security controls on complex multi-agent systems. That's why we built Multifactor. Multifactor offers best-in-class authentication, authorization, and auditing technologies for agentic systems, allowing users to securely and revocably share online accounts with agents while maintaining fine-grained permissions and a detailed event history. We are doing for AI security what Cloudflare did for web security, Okta did for identity security, and Wiz did for cloud security: defining the category. A world-class "account manager" that allows agents to securely use online accounts on your behalf is just the start—our early enterprise partners include companies using AI agents to manage $7.5+ billion manufacturing supply chains, where the consequences for lapses in security are severe. Our patented AI security technology seamlessly integrates with existing agentic software to thwart attacks like prompt injection, so CISOs and end users alike can breathe a sigh of relief, without slowing the pace of AI adoption.

name: Allus AI
one_liner: Transforming manufacturing with our next-gen Vision Foundation Model
long_description: We combine cutting-edge AI with challenges that have troubled manufacturing for over a century. Kai, Shijie, and Jason began exploring how AI could empower industry while studying at Georgia Tech. Kai comes from a family deeply rooted in manufacturing and grew up in factories, managing production for IPhone back panel at the age of 18. Shijie previously worked as an LLM scientist at NVIDIA Lab, where he gained firsthand insight into the pain points of manufacturing. Jason has always operated on the front lines of industrial enterprises and developed universal solutions for robotics companies.

name: Unsiloed AI
one_liner: API for parsing multimodal unstructured data
long_description: AI teams spend 6+ months building document workflows, yet fewer than 10% ever reach production. Generic LLM parsers and OCR collapse on multimodal documents with text, tables, images, and charts. Poor parsing and suboptimal chunking cripple RAG pipelines and downstream automation. Unsiloed AI has built state-of-the-art vision models which serves as the infrastructure layer for turning unstructured data into structured, queryable, and LLM-ready assets. Our APIs are already parsing hundreds of thousands of documents for startups and NASDAQ-listed enterprises, powering vertical AI solutions across industries. On public benchmarks, Unsiloed AI consistently outperforms solutions from LlamaIndex, Gemini, Mistral, and Unstructured.io among others.

name: SF Tensor
one_liner: Infrastructure for AI labs to focus on research.
long_description: AI researchers should be pushing the boundaries of what's possible with new architectures and training methods. Instead, they waste weeks configuring cloud infrastructure, debugging distributed systems, and optimizing their GPU code. We know because we lived it: While training our own models across thousands of GPUs earlier this year, we spent more time fighting our infrastructure than doing actual research. That's why we're building two things. First, Elastic Cloud: a managed platform that automatically finds the cheapest GPUs across all providers, handles spot instance preemption, and cuts compute costs by up to 80%. Second, automatic kernel optimization that makes training code run faster by modeling hardware topology, often beating hand-tuned implementations. The problem is that getting high performance across different hardware is genuinely hard. NVIDIA's CUDA moat exists because writing fast kernels requires deep expertise. Most teams either accept vendor lock-in or hire expensive kernel engineers. Our goal is to break the CUDA moat. The compute bottleneck is the biggest constraint on AI progress. NVIDIA can't manufacture enough GPUs, and their monopoly keeps prices astronomical. Meanwhile, AMD, Google, and Amazon are shipping capable alternative hardware that nobody uses because the software is too hard. We're breaking that moat. If we succeed, anyone will be able to train state-of-the-art models without thinking past their PyTorch code.

name: AnswerThis
one_liner: End-to-end workspace to accelerate scientific discovery
long_description: AnswerThis is a scientific discovery platform used by over 200,000 researchers that reduces weeks of manual research work to hours. Instead of manually searching, reading, and organizing dozens of papers, researchers use AnswerThis to find the most relevant work, see how ideas are connected, and get comprehensive answers to complex scientific questions with line by line answers. This allows them to map research gaps, analyze trends, and draft literature reviews far faster, all while building a searchable library of their own research materials.

name: Terrain
one_liner: AI native GTM platform for the physical economy
long_description: ex-Uber, Oracle, UW-Madison| Built Fulfillment Metrics serving 6M+ drivers and 150M+ monthly active users | Previously built Zanzibar - Uber's open-source API infrastructure serving 1M+ requests per second. Passionate about building great teams, and delivering value to users.

name: Lakonia
one_liner: Delivering AI-powered situational awareness in tactical environments.
long_description: We’re two Stanford engineering students who left after our freshman year to go build the tools that our public safety and military teams deserve. In designing and building our platform, we were heavily inspired by RTS video games we’ve played as intuitive interfaces for delivering critical information to players. We wondered why law enforcement and the military don’t have similar tools and decided to go build them ourselves.

name: SellRaze
one_liner: The fastest way to sell online.
long_description: I'm Jeff, co-founder and CEO of SellRaze. In high school I was a sneaker reseller. Instead of paying attention in math class, I was building custom software to snag Jordan releases. During COVID, I reverse engineered Amazon's anti-bot system and sold it to scalpers... which crashed the supply chain for 30 series graphics cards, PS5s, and Xbox X's. Now I help people buy and sell online :)

name: Mod AI
one_liner: Touchless AP Automation
long_description: We're building the first fully autonomous accounts payable platform. Our AI clerks handle your entire AP workflow: invoice processing, GL coding, PO matching, approvals, responding to vendors, fraud detection and reporting. From the moment an invoice hits your inbox to the moment it's paid, no manual steps required. We integrate with 16+ ERPs including QuickBooks, NetSuite, SAP, Dynamics 365, and Workday. Find out why enterprise teams choose Mod AI at usemod.ai.

name: Semble AI
one_liner: AI Agents for contractors, manufacturers, and logistics
long_description: Semble builds custom AI agents trained on how your business actually runs and plugged into the tools your team already lives in. Jonathan and Ethan met studying computer science at Stanford. Jonathan worked at Convergint, one of the world's largest building system integrators.

name: Flick
one_liner: We Handle AI. You Direct Films.
long_description: Flick is an AI filmmaking software that lets people create Hollywood-level short films completely using AI end-to-end. There are many AI tools that can give you 8-second casual clips to post on social media, but when it comes to creating truly high-quality films with coherent storylines, consistent characters, and cinematic aesthetics, they don’t come close due to their lack of flexibility, creative control, and fragmented creative flow. Founded by an award-winning filmmaker and a founding engineer at Instagram, Flick defines an interface specifically designed for native AI filmmaking that feels natural and enables end-to-end creative flows. Think of Flick as Figma for AI filmmaking. There are 4 complete AI short films created using Flick that got 20+ awards in international film festivals already and our early creator residency community are generating several AI short films every week. We are also building a community where we produce our own AI films as well as collaborating with other well-known filmmakers to share their “behind-the-scenes” workflows as resuable templates to inspire users in our community. We not only build product, we also build world-class content. The whole film industry will be revolutionized by AI and our goal is to be “the product” that defines this category.

name: hillclimb
one_liner: Training Data for Recursive Self-Improvement
long_description: In the business of connecting the world’s smartest people to frontier labs, I understand the AI researcher’s perspective on what makes good training data, and Ibrakhim understands how to properly vet talent.

name: AtlasGrid
one_liner: Accelerate Product Iteration
long_description: AtlasGrid is building towards a future in which generative design is commoditized, and the primary differentiator for teams will be performance. How quickly they can identify opportunities, ship improvements, and measure results. Our platform will integrate directly with AI code-generation tools, enabling developers to rapidly launch design variations suggested by “the grid,” dynamically reconfiguring their app for growth.

name: Wardstone
one_liner: Satellites for Missile Defense
long_description: I am the cofounder & CEO of Wardstone, a space defense company building satellites to defend the U.S. and its allies from hypersonic and ballistic missiles. I have 10+ years of engineering and product experience in satellites, drones, and self-driving cars. I held leadership roles at Amazon Prime Air and Cruise Self-Driving and previously worked at Lockheed Martin and NASA on Planetary Spacecraft. I studied Aerospace Engineering at MIT and did a dual MS/MBA degree at Harvard.

name: Nessie
one_liner: A shared context layer for you, your team, and your agents.
long_description: Knowledge work is being restructured by AI. Strategy happens in Claude. Research happens in ChatGPT. Building happens in Claude Code. The people defining the next decade of work are already thinking with AI every day. But none of that thinking compounds. Every session starts from zero. The reasoning behind decisions, the context behind strategies, the evolution of ideas across hundreds of conversations - all of it evaporates. Nessie is the infrastructure that makes it permanent. We auto-sync AI conversations and agent traces across every major provider - ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Perplexity, Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, and more - and turn them into a context layer that is queryable, reusable, and shareable by you, your team, and your agents. No browser extension. No manual capture. Your thinking flows in automatically and compounds over time. Where we are going: the AI-native organization runs thousands of agents that are powerful but amnesiac, and Nessie is the layer that integrates what the organization knows, what it has decided, and how its thinking has evolved. Science has journals, law has case law, software has git; AI-native knowledge work has had nothing. We are building it. We are two Yale CS grads and former Amazon engineers. Backed by BoxGroup, Pioneer Fund, Y Combinator, Precursor, and more. https://nessielabs.com

name: Hypercubic
one_liner: Agentic AI for Mainframe Operations and Modernization
long_description: Hypercubic is an AI-native platform for mainframe operations and modernization. We help enterprises understand and modernize their mission-critical legacy systems. About 70% of the Fortune 500 companies still rely on them to run their core business applications in banking, insurance, telecom, airlines, retail, and more. These systems, originally built in the 1960s–90s, still power trillions in global infrastructure today but have become increasingly opaque as original developers retire or leave the workforce. We are pioneering a new class of intelligence capable of understanding, reasoning about, and rebuilding the world’s foundational infrastructure. Learn more at hypercubic.ai

name: Cranston AI
one_liner: AI Tax prep and accounting software for CPA firms
long_description: Cranston is AI tax prep and bookkeeping for CPA firms. Our tax agents prepare returns the way a strong staff accountant would: they read the source documents, work the return in your tax software, and hand your reviewer a return that holds up, with workpapers attached. Our bookkeeping agents keep client books current all year, so tax season starts from clean numbers instead of cleanup. Prep and books are the start. We're building Cranston into the system a firm runs on: the place where prep, review, client requests, and the rest of the practice get done.

name: Trelium
one_liner: The Agent to Build Your Agents
long_description: Across wholesalers, distributors, field-service companies, custom-order shops, foodservice, industrial supply, packaging, labels, and more — the story is the same:

name: Velum Labs
one_liner: The OS for data quality across any stack
long_description: Velum is the operating system for data quality. Velum automatically monitors and enforces data quality across a company's data stack, so bad data never reaches dashboards. We turn data quality from a manual task into infrastructure that runs itself. Data trust you can prove. From the pipeline to the boardroom.

name: Veria Labs
one_liner: Continuous AI pentesting that finds and fixes vulnerabilities
long_description: Veria Labs is developing AI agents that hack better than the best human hackers. Founded by members of the #1 US competitive hacking team, we've already found critical bugs in AI tools, operating systems, fintech and billion dollar crypto exchanges. Now we're scaling that expertise through AI-native security tooling that operates faster than human researchers while finding deeper, more complex vulnerabilities that traditional tools miss.

name: Minro
one_liner: Identify churn risk and stay close to users at scale
long_description: Minro helps companies stay close to their users as they scale. Today, most startups have thousands of product events flowing through tools like PostHog, but still have no real understanding of who their users actually are, which users are quietly about to churn, or what outreach actually brings them back. Founders care deeply about their users, but staying close to them becomes operationally impossible very quickly. Minro plugs directly into a company’s analytics stack and turns product activity into living customer intelligence. We enrich every user with context like their company, role, LinkedIn/GitHub/Twitter, background, and likely use case, currently matching users to the correct online identity with ~80% accuracy starting from just name + email. We then identify which users are most likely to churn based on behavioral patterns, persona similarity, and historical retention signals, and help founders proactively reach out before those users disappear. Minro drafts highly contextual founder-style outreach, tracks which conversations actually convert into retention, and continuously improves the system over time. The result is a customer intelligence and retention layer that helps companies understand their users better, build stronger relationships, and reduce churn before it happens.

name: Tell if AI
one_liner: AI agents on real phones, growing brands across every platform.
long_description: An AI-run performance marketing agency. We deploy autonomous agents on a fleet of real mobile phones that create, post, and grow content across YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, X, Reddit and more operating hundreds of accounts in parallel, indistinguishable from human creators. Brands hire us the way they'd hire a growth agency, but instead of a team of marketers we run the entire pipeline autonomously: ideation, video production, posting, engagement, and audience building. We get paid on revenue share, so our incentives are aligned with our partners' growth. Our first partnership is revenue sharing with a telehealth clinic, where we're driving patient acquisition across dozens of channels we built and operate end-to-end.

name: Bron
one_liner: ChatGPT for Sports Betting
long_description: The timing couldn't have been better. Marc, fresh from two years of AI and computer vision research at the Mayo Clinic, happened to be in my AI in SportsTech class at Berkeley. I pitched him my problem, and within minutes, we were deep in discussion about how AI and computer vision could crack it.

name: Koyal
one_liner: Agentic AI Filmmaking Platform
long_description: Koyal is an Agentic AI Filmmaking Platform that allows you to seamlessly convert script or audio into personalized, visually compelling stories. We’re a team from Carnegie Mellon, MIT and Meta, with experience in AI video generation. https://koyal.ai builds directly upon our published research at the AI conference NeurIPS in December. We’ve been covered in the international press for our patented secure personalization protocol CHARCHA: the genAI captcha. Announcement: https://x.com/meh_agarwal/status/1965866965425348687 Demo: https://x.com/meh_agarwal/status/1965137062119752099 We currently have paid pilots with the biggest global music labels, podcasts and production houses, and just launched our public beta at beta.koyal.ai We recently concluded a pilot with Universal Music and T-Series (world’s largest music label) alongside Bollywood production houses like Maddock Entertainment, and Collective Artists Network! As part of that, we launched 5 music videos for Grammy and Oscar winning artists like A R Rahman, Ricky Kej and Shankar Mahadevan all crossing 1.5 million views! We've recently built SOTA capabilities in (i) multilingual script to audio to video, (ii) Agentic lip-sync with dynamic movement & (iii) Multi-character consistency.

name: Kaigo Health
one_liner: AI outpatient care workforce
long_description: Our mission is personal. Each of us watched someone we love slip through the cracks of today’s healthcare system. Peter’s grandfather suffered three preventable ER readmissions before passing—his ruptured aorta went undetected after missed medications and a complete absence of follow-up care. Lukas’s grandmother, who raised him, deteriorated in assisted living—isolated, depressed, and unrecognizable before passing unexpectedly just days before he arrived. Kazuki’s grandfather battled cancer alone in Japan, cut off from family by COVID-era hospital restrictions—reminding us that healing requires more than medicine.

name: Norra
one_liner: Automating equipment operations for nursing facilities
long_description: With custom hardwares, Norra creates a digital twin of their entire facility, giving staff complete visibility into everything happening on the ground. With all of this data, we are able to use AI to transform the operational chaos into proactive decision making. Instead of reacting to equipment going into disrepair or overpurchasing equipment due to lack of visibility, staff now get actionable insights to prevent waste before it happens.

name: Soren
one_liner: AI Transformation for Regulated Institutions
long_description: Soren is the AI transformation partner for regulated institutions. We help companies identify, deploy, and operate AI safely across high-impact workflows. As an AI-native company, we deliver outcomes in a fraction of the time and cost of traditional consulting firms while providing a more efficient, streamlined client experience. We partner with organizations at every stage, from early exploration to full-scale AI transformations.

name: Lunavo
one_liner: Lunavo is the AI assistant for carriers.
long_description: We build AI that runs carrier operations. Lunavo is the AI assistant for carriers. It plugs directly into their existing toolstack, understands their processes, and monitors all incoming data and requests. Lunavo runs end-to-end backoffice operations, handling repetitive tasks, resolving issues autonomously, and escalating only what matters. Lunavo helps carriers scale operations without scaling headcount.

name: dari.dev
one_liner: The Production Layer for AI Agents
long_description: We let developers deploy AI agents as API endpoints with built-in tools, sandboxes, and durable execution. Agents maintain state, run long-lived workflows, and handle retries automatically.

name: The Context Company
one_liner: Monitor AI agents and understand user behavior
long_description: Understand user patterns and find silent failures in your AI agents. The Context Company helps teams analyze AI agent conversations to surface user behavior patterns, performance trends, and moments where agents struggle - so teams know what’s working, what’s not, and what to improve next. We turn raw conversations into structured signals: topic clustering, user feedback analysis, custom pattern tracking, and alerts. All alongside traditional observability like traces, tool calls, latency, and costs. Get started in less than 10 lines of code.

name: Sorce
one_liner: Tinder for jobs
long_description: Figma, Ramp, Kleiner Perkins, OpenAI, Lucid Motors, Humane, Twitch (S07), DoorDash (S13), Instacart (S12), Coinbase (S12), Scale AI (S16), Deel (W19), Webflow (S13), Amplitude (W12), Postman, Anduril, Flexport (W14), Mercury, Windsurf, Groq, MoniePoint and many more!

name: Caddy
one_liner: Your Personal AI for everyday work. Lives in your texts.
long_description: If you’ve got a lot to do, we believe AI can make things feel doable. Caddy is our core product: a Personal AI that helps you stay on top of everything going on. All you have to do is text. On overwhelming days, it’s super simple to just drop any task in a text thread, and Caddy will help you handle it. Caddy also keeps an eye on your calendars, chats and tasks to make sure you stay focused on what matters. If something needs you, Caddy will nudge you, or can just do it if you don’t have time. The best part is, no two Caddys are alike. The more you use Caddy, the more it learns your vibe, how you work, and what you care about.

name: Alt-X
one_liner: Building the best venue for private markets exposure.
long_description: Alt-X is building the AI-native liquidity layer for private markets. Private markets have created trillions of dollars in value, yet remain fragmented, illiquid, and inaccessible. While public markets benefit from exchanges, market makers, brokerages, and data infrastructure, private markets still rely on brokers, spreadsheets, and manual workflows to connect buyers and sellers. Alt-X uses AI to automate the core functions required to make private assets liquid. We streamline diligence, valuation, investor matching, and transaction execution, reducing the friction that makes private-market transactions slow, expensive, and opaque today. Our initial focus is venture-backed secondaries. We source opportunities from founders, employees, and early investors while building a network of accredited investors seeking exposure to the world's most valuable private companies. Over time, we believe every private asset—from startup equity to private credit and alternative investments—will require modern liquidity infrastructure. Building trusted infrastructure for private markets is difficult. Transactions involve complex diligence, fragmented information, transfer restrictions, and significant compliance requirements. Alt-X is focused on creating systems that can support real transactions at scale, not just marketplace listings. Ryan Samadi (Stanford CS/AI, former Citadel commodities trader) and Michael Wachsman (Cornell CS, infrastructure engineer) are building Alt-X because they believe ownership of innovation should be more liquid, transparent, and accessible. Today, Alt-X has sourced over $1.5 million in transaction opportunities and assembled a network of 40 accredited investors representing hundreds of millions of dollars in investable assets. Our mission is to democratize ownership of innovation by building the financial infrastructure that private markets have never had.

name: Locus
one_liner: Payment infrastructure for AI agents
long_description: We make your agents pay. As agents evolve from tools into dependable, autonomous actors, they’ll need the ability to execute open-ended workflows end-to-end. This inevitably means payments: accessing paywalled data, transacting for services or with other specialist agents. But autonomy requires guardrails. Businesses and developers will need a way to ensure their agents only spend how much and on what they’re supposed to. The machine economy is coming, and Locus (YC F25) is building the connector businesses will need to participate. We connect agents securely to funds, letting you define permissions and limits for every transaction. Each payment is traceable, auditable, and fully reconcilable with your existing financial stack.

name: Deeptrace
one_liner: AI agents for on-call
long_description: At Deeptrace, we’re building AI agents that investigate and resolve production alerts end-to-end. Deeptrace cuts through the noise, pinpoints root causes instantly, and gives engineering teams back what they need most: the freedom to build instead of firefighting. In production, we're already seeing a reduction in time spent triaging, investigating, and resolving alerts with some of the fastest growing companies in the world.

name: Aspect
one_liner: Intelligent media storage for creative teams.
long_description: Aspect helps creative teams consolidate 5 media tools into one platform. We provide everything a media team needs: file ingest, local file streaming, review and approval, sharing, and archiving. Aspect workspaces come with an agent that has complete understanding of your asset library including comments and revisions. Ask the agent to complete any task in the background: searching for files, setting up folder structures, labeling and organizing footage, and much more. Check out aspect.inc/use-cases to see how different media teams use Aspect to deliver content faster.

name: Scoop
one_liner: Automating regulatory submissions for life sciences
long_description: We’re building AI agents that speed up drug trials by automating the manual consolidation and document prep required for every IND submission. Today, biotechs spend months stitching together reports from contractors and internal teams just to file and get to their first-in-human trial.

name: Hyperspell
one_liner: Your Company Brain
long_description: Hyperspell is your Company Brain. AI agents are brilliant and clueless. They ace any test and still have no idea how your company works. Hyperspell connects your tools and synthesizes documents and conversations into a live, permissioned context graph. Any agent can read from it and write back to it like a filesystem, with every fact traced to source.

name: Bolna AI
one_liner: Voice AI to enable India's next billion
long_description: Bolna handles the complexity of voice infra, so enterprises can automate calls faster, better, and cheaper, at scale Bolna is a Voice AI Orchestration platform purpose-built for Indian enterprises. Businesses in India run tens of thousands of calls every day - across sales, support, collections, recruitment, and more. Bolna gives them the power to build and deploy Voice AI Agents directly from their transcripts and FAQs, so they can start automating calls immediately. With Bolna, enterprises get: 1. Full control over agent intelligence, tone, and workflows 2. Cost efficiency at scale with smart routing across providers and price points 3. Enterprise-grade performance on latency, interruptions, multi-language, and multi-accent understanding

name: Nexus
one_liner: We help non-technical teams build AI agents without engineers
long_description: Aerospace engineer and ex-McKinsey consultant turned startup founder, now building NexusGPT—the enterprise no-code platform for AI agents. Currently helping 10+ large enterprises (Orange, Waterland Private Equity, etc.) automate and scale with AI. Passionate about agentic workflows, lean operations, and democratizing AI for business teams. Always up for swapping startup war stories or talking about the future of work.

name: Zavo
one_liner: AI Operating System for Restaurants
long_description: Zavo is the AI-powered operating system for restaurants. We bring payments, point of sale, and AI agents into one unified platform, so restaurants can run their entire business seamlessly. From reservations to payments to POS, Zavo replaces fragmented tools with a fully integrated stack built in-house. Our AI agents automate repetitive tasks, streamline operations, and help teams focus on delivering great guest experiences.

name: MOVEdot
one_liner: AI Agents for Hardware Engineering
long_description: Our agents run hardware engineering tasks that normally take hours or days in just a few minutes, allowing engineers to process 100x more data and information. Our platform allows hardware engineers to orchestrate agents for tasks such as analyzing failures across entire test campaigns, pulling the right data and KPIs from their databases, checking how conditions (like temperature or load) affect performance and reliability, and then document findings in reports and dashboards.

name: Parrot
one_liner: TikTok for language learning
long_description: Parrot is the TikTok for language learning. We turn doomscrolling into fluency with personalized short-form videos. Power users scroll for 6 hours/week on Parrot. Our team of engineers have lived the frustration of ineffective apps and learning methods - we’re building the first language platform that actually works.

name: Brickwise
one_liner: AI property manager for landlords and estate agents
long_description: We've built an AI property manager that automates maintenance requests, handling tenant calls and messages 24/7, following up by chasing contractors and resolving issues. We're based in London, but have over 10 customers throughout the world, from San Francisco to Dubai. We have a reliable sales pipeline, including a >$1m cARR enterprise contract. Since our formation 6 months ago, we have raised over $3M in funding. Ismail, co-founder & CEO, is an ex-Founder at LiveLink AI, where he raised $3M, growing the platform to editing 150k videos per month. He also built his own prop firm to $500k ARR. Elias, co-founder & CTO, was an early engineer at a YC backed company, acquired by Google. While a senior engineer at Google for 5 years, he took the product from $50k ARR to >$100m. CS at Bristol, MBA from Imperial.

name: Parse
one_liner: Build an API to interact with any website.
long_description: I started coding at 12 to build bots to purchase limited edition sneakers in seconds. After leaving that scene, I led engineering at a trading card market platform and researched political botnets at Berkeley. No matter where I went, I realized how crucial live web data and interaction is and how slow current solutions are. I launched the first version of Parse in August and got to 35k users in a month.

name: Structured AI
one_liner: AI workforce for Construction Engineering
long_description: Brandon started coding and making games when he was 12. At 17, a YouTube video he made demonstrating a fighter jet trained with deep reinforcement learning to dodge missiles went viral. This led to him being scouted by a US construction contractor to apply that same algorithm to MEP pipe routing optimization. He then spent the next six years, throughout high school and university, contracting and building AI tools for the construction and engineering industry. He later led innovation and scaled AI tools in-house at a top US engineering firm, ultimately spinning out with his team to form Structured AI.

name: Uplane
one_liner: Replace marketing agencies with AI
long_description: Uplane replaces marketing agencies with AI. We generate hundreds of ads with matching landing pages and steer the ad spend across channels like Meta, Google, LinkedIn and others. By connecting to CRM and ERP data, Uplane learns what drives profits and continuously improves campaigns. Companies waste billions on bad ads, mismatched landing pages, and poor budget allocation. Uplane fixes this by replacing a patchwork of agencies, spreadsheets, and siloed tools with one self-improving system. The result: Higher ROAS for enterprises and effortless, expert-level marketing for SMBs.

name: AirCaps
one_liner: The AI copilot for in-person conversations.
long_description: AirCaps is bringing AI assistance to in-person conversations. Our AI-copilot provides live captions, translations, AI meeting notes and insights for in-person conversations in real-time. It's deployed as an app for lightweight AR glasses so you can see visual information overlaid onto your field of vision. You can think of it like a Zoom AI meeting assistant or Granola, but for in-person conversations, and with the ability to proactively help you in real-time, not just after the conversation. We’re building the capture and intelligence layer for the 216 billion daily conversations that happen face-to-face. We’ve already processed 16,500 hours of real-world conversations and counting. Today, AirCaps assists with 11% of our users’ in-person conversations. We did $93K in revenue in October and grew 6.5x from September while spending <$3K on marketing (and hit $70K in revenue in the first 2 weeks of November). Our power users average 6h+ daily usage and our day-30 retention is 91%. We previously went viral (75M+ views on TikTok, 150K+ followers) and have been featured by The New Yorker, WIRED, and Forbes. Madhav (CEO, Yale CS) has been building in audio and AR since age 13, starting with Google Glass apps and voice assistants for Raspberry Pis. He researched audio AI at the MIT Media Lab. Nirbhay (CTO, Cornell CS) built voice AI on smart glasses in high school and built conversational AI products as the first engineer at 2 YC startups.

name: Brickanta
one_liner: Agentic AI for Society Builders
long_description: Brickanta – agentic AI for society builders. Hundreds of construction-specific AI agents for project analysis, insights, tenders, procurement, and more. Combine the latest AI technology with your organization's project data, templates, and workflows to identify risks and opportunities early and produce better decision support. Brickanta has raised $8 million from leading AI, construction, and real estate investors behind companies like OpenAI/ChatGPT, Airbnb, Klarna, Spotify, and Plangrid-Autodesk, as well as star investors such as Mario Götze, Anton Osika, and Northzone (see movie and press). The founding team has been building and implementing AI in construction and industry since 2018 at companies such as ABB, Fabege, Husqvarna, IKEA and Konecranes.

name: F2
one_liner: The AI platform for private markets investors
long_description: F2 is the AI platform for private markets investors. Purpose-built for private credit, private equity, and commercial banking, F2 accelerates diligence, underwriting, and portfolio monitoring, helping teams evaluate deals over 60% faster. F2 turns unstructured deal data into investment-grade analysis and polished memos in minutes. Unlike general-purpose AI, F2 is built with the domain expertise and depth to handle the most complex financial analysis. Already trusted across thousands of deals, F2 makes collaboration easy and retains historical context, so past work compounds into future wins. Headquartered in New York City, F2 is backed by leading investors including NFX, Left Lane Capital, and Y Combinator.

name: Semiotic
one_liner: Studio-Grade Design at Scale
long_description: Semiotic builds AI design agents. We’re starting with agents that build landing pages for fast‑growing startups. Existing AI website builders didn't make creating websites easier—they made creating ugly websites easier. So, companies choose between blue-purple gradient slop or agencies with 3-month waitlists and $100k minimums. You don't have to choose anymore. Start a project: semiotic.com

name: Lapis
one_liner: AI that creates and runs ads, end-end
long_description: Lapis builds, launches, and scales paid ad campaigns for DTC and SaaS businesses. Lapis agents handle every step of the paid ads journey: writing ad copy (headlines and descriptions), generating the static images used in ads, deploying campaigns across paid channels, creating a custom landing page for each ad, and feeding real user interaction data back into a self-improving ads engine that gets better every day. With Lapis, businesses can rapidly iterate on ads and A/B test at scale, free from the human design and creative bottlenecks that slow teams down. Using Lapis, companies can quantitatively improve their paid ads performance by up to 20x. Lapis is used by 1,500+ marketing teams and 30+ enterprises, from Fortune 500 businesses to fast growing DTC businesses, and supports 10 languages including English, Spanish, and Italian.

name: Efference
long_description: Humans and nearly every other mammal have evolved the same solution to this problem over the past 500 million years of evolution: stereo triangulation + data-driven inference. We integrate every available depth cue – shadows, perspective, occlusions, and much more – along with what we know about objects and the environment to accurately represent 3D scenes and act accordingly.

name: Nox Metals
one_liner: Supplying America's Industrial Base
long_description: Factories waste time quoting, sourcing, and cutting aluminum blocks. It's slow, manual, and adds unnecessary overhead. This inefficiency compounds across thousands of jobs, dragging down margins and throughput. We started Nox to automate this layer and unlock speed and scale for modern manufacturing.

name: Digipals
one_liner: The future of Social in the age of AI
long_description: Social networks are dead. Social media became more media than social. My friends aren't on social media anymore - it's one third ads, one third content from strangers, and one third AI slop. Our social lives are fragmented across dozens of different apps - iMessage, WhatsApp, Find My, Partiful, and Venmo. Digipals is the first AI-native social operating system that improves our relationships with friends. We built ambient AI agents that use social context from our location, calendar, and photos to take action and write code in our group chats. We are the last social platform anyone will ever need. Launch Video https://youtu.be/KW2tjLl6sxM

name: Blue
one_liner: Your phone finally has someone to run it. Plug in Blue, just ask.
long_description: Everyone pays someone to handle the parts of their life that don't need them personally. The cleaner, the bookkeeper, the lawn service. Nobody could handle what lives in your phone. Until Blue. Blue is a small USB-C dongle and iPhone app. Plug it in and say what needs doing. The follow-up you haven't sent, the appointment you haven't booked, the reply you owe. Blue opens the right app, does the work, and tells you when it's done. You don't touch your phone. Works with every app already on your iPhone. The team brings complementary experience at scale: Omar Abdelaziz led Google Assistant’s transition to LLMs and holds one of earliest patents in LLM-based computer control; Peter Krogh spent decades designing voice-first dialog systems and was most recently a design lead at Google DeepMind building actions for Gemini Live; Muhammad Farhan Hossain helped ship Apple Vision Pro, is named on dozens of hardware/systems patents, and has led products from prototype to mass production. We’ve built systems used by billions. Now we’re on to defining the next era of computing.

name: Mixy
one_liner: Make mashups without knowing how to DJ
long_description: Mixy flips this model. We celebrate artists by letting fans directly manipulate and share versions of their songs. Every time a fan shares their creation, the artist is automatically credited and their work is distributed more widely. Because Mixy owns the creation layer, attribution is native. We auto-credit every source track and pair it with a music-first social network built for playback and discovery.

name: Paloma
one_liner: Digital transformation for real economy businesses
long_description: We met at Deel, where we were early employees. Naz (CEO) and Alex (CRO) spent 3 years building and scaling Deel’s largest revenue-generating product from zero to $500m ARR. Kai (CTO) led the development of Deel’s billing and payments infrastructure from the ground up. We’ve lived the pain of messy post-sales firsthand and we’re building Paloma to solve it.

name: Uplift AI
one_liner: Foundational Voice Models for regional languages
long_description: We build Voice Models for regional languages (like Urdu, Bengali, Greek etc) and make them available through simple APIs and SDKs. Developers use us to create Voice-first digital experiences (eg. Voice eCommerce, Voice Banking, Voice AI Tutors etc). We gather our own data, develop our own labelling tools, train our own models, and design our own voice infra. This fully integrated approach enables us to offer the best models and the best developer experience for regional languages. --- People who would previously never use certain digital services (like online ordering), actually use the service when they are given an intuitive Voice based interface. We believe that Voice Interfaces will onboard 100s of millions of new users onto digital services; and double the addressable market for technology companies. Uplift AI will provide the best models to create these Voice Interfaces for 60% of the world's population that only speaks their regional language and represents 42 trillion dollars in GDP.

name: RealRoots
one_liner: IRL friendship app for women
long_description: We’re building the product we desperately wished existed. After moving 10 times between us, we’ve repeatedly felt the struggle of rebuilding a community from scratch, and the isolation that follows. We created RealRoots because we want to solve this problem, for ourselves and for every woman seeking genuine connection.

name: Luminal
one_liner: Making AI run fast on any hardware.
long_description: Our key insight is that by treating optimization as a search problem, we’re able to automatically discover extremely complex optimizations in minutes that would take a GPU expert weeks. We use a series of ‘rewrite rules’ to create millions of graphs to describe your model, generate kernel code for each and then search for the fastest one based on runtime.

name: Freya
one_liner: Voice AI for Enterprises
long_description: CEO and Co-founder of Freya. Previously, he built VLMs for geometric reasoning and worked on Audio Transformers as an AI research engineer. As a Math Olympian, ranked 1st among 250,000 students at the Urfodu Math Olympiad and later 203rd Turkey’s national exams out of 3.5M+. At 16, he wrote his first paper on Quantum Machine Learning. Before dropping out of UPenn, he was a Teaching Assistant in the Engineering School and part of an AI Research team at Penn.

name: burnt
one_liner: Agentic Operating System for Food Supply Chain
long_description: Food Supply Chain companies have been using legacy ERPs for decades. Everyone knows these are necessary evils that essentially run the business but take up a lot of operational capacity. They are not about to just rip and replace their existing system that runs their whole business with a system that takes years to implement. Imagine if they could implement AI that runs the ERP for them, in weeks? Burnt’s building an agentic OS for the Food Supply Chain with AI Agents for each department. Our AI Agent, Ozai, has started by replacing the whole order management job function at food distribution companies, so that sales and customer service teams can focus on what matters - the customer. Ozai monitors all incoming messages (emails, phone calls, voicemails, whatsapp, fax etc.), figures out if it's an order, learns each customer's habits, shorthand, and favorite products, picks up on any prep notes, and enters it straight into the existing ERP. It'll even go back to the customers on your behalf when it's not sure about something, clarify things and carry on working. The more it sees, the smarter it gets.

name: Avent
one_liner: AI agents for industrial commerce
long_description: Abhay is the Founder and CEO of Avent. Abhay studied Electrical Engineering and Computer Science at UC Berkeley, where he conducted computer vision research for defect detection in manufacturing. Before Avent, Abhay was an operator in the manufacturing and industrial distribution space.

name: Ruvo
one_liner: The Global Dollar App for Brazil
long_description: Ruvo is a global account for receiving, holding, and moving money between USD and BRL. We connect Pix, crypto, and Visa so you can receive USD from abroad, convert between USD and BRL in minutes, send money to the U.S., spend worldwide, and save in digital dollars with yield — all in one place. Ruvo supports both personal (CPF) and business (CNPJ) accounts, with low fees, strong security, and direct Pix settlement. Formerly known as Cacao.

name: Veritus
one_liner: AI agents for the consumer lending industry
long_description: Veritus is a omni-channel platform for deploying AI agents for loan servicing and collections, including inbound and outbound voice agents. Our agents negotiate repayment plans, follow up across channels, and drive recoveries with zero human involvement. By combining cutting edge voice AI with deep regulatory compliance and vertical specialization we're able to drastically reduce the cost-to-collect while increasing recovery rates.

name: Outrove
one_liner: Synthetic populations for decisions
long_description: Surveys ask people what they think they’ll do. Focus groups ask a handful of people to explain behavior they often don’t understand themselves. Sapien simulates entire populations instead. We create AI agents that model how real audiences behave, letting companies, governments, and investors test decisions in minutes: what product to launch, what price to set, what campaign to run, what policy will work, or how a market will move. The output is not another dashboard. It’s a prediction of what will happen, which segments will drive it, and what decision is most likely to win.

name: NOSO LABS
one_liner: Build AI agents for field technicians to diagnose and sell 10x better
long_description: In the home services industry, field technicians are expected to handle three key tasks: diagnosing issues, making sales, and completing paperwork. It's rare to find individuals who excel at all three. We build AI agents to support technicians by improving diagnostic accuracy and helping them capture sales opportunities.

name: Vulcan Technologies
one_liner: Secure frontier AI for government & adjacent knowledge work
long_description: Vulcan builds agents for government and government-adjacent work. We currently sell two agents: Justinian and Trajan. Justinian is an AI agent coworker for people who work in and adjacent to American government. To power Justinian, we created the world’s largest legal and policy database and knowledge graph, accessible to our customers via our platform, email, and Slack. Trajan is a public-facing AI concierge built to help governments modernize service delivery. Hosted on a government website, Trajan helps businesses and citizens automatically complete permits, licenses, applications, and answer regulatory and legal questions. In addition to government customers, Vulcan's agents serve regulatory, legal, policy, and government relations teams at major U.S. enterprises.

name: Bizzy AI
one_liner: Bizzy works 24/7 so you never miss a lead.
long_description: Bizzy handles your calls, captures and qualifies leads, and books appointments directly into your CRM. It understands your services better than a receptionist would, routes and escalates calls, and syncs with your existing tools to incorporate complex workflows, all so your team can focus on servicing leads, not qualifying them.

name: Spotlight Realty
one_liner: AI powered brokerage reducing residential rental commissions in NYC…
long_description: Spotlight Realty finds your future tenants with proprietary lead generation software that uses AI to scrape the internet and various other data sources. Spotlight also posts your listings to online marketplaces(e.g StreetEasy, Zillow, etc.) and shows it to prospective tenants with targeted social media ads, where renters’ eyes actually are. Inquiry handling, coordinating, screening, scheduling, and touring are all covered in-house. Handle all your offers through our platform. If you need help, we have a team of licensed agents and lawyers to guide you through the process.

name: Interfere
one_liner: Production visibility for teams that ship fast
long_description: Founder of Interfere (YC S25), we’re building the self-healing layer of the internet: software that helps software engineers spend less time fixing bugs, and for the first time allow non-technical members of your team to understand how your product actually works in real-life.

name: Munify
one_liner: The Cross-Border Neobank for the Middle East
long_description: Founder & CEO at Munify (YC S2025), building a cross-border Neobank for the Middle East and its Diaspora. Previously founded Huspy (Sequoia-backed Series B, doing $7B in transactions annually). Before that, 10 years leading engineering teams at Microsoft and Uber.

name: RowFlow
one_liner: Replacing forms with AI conversations
long_description: RowFlow replaces clunky web forms with natural conversations that run over text, slack, or wherever your users are. Our platform increases your form’s response rates while cutting your internal overhead in half. With RowFlow, you can take any existing form and instantly convert it into an AI-powered conversation. New flows launch in minutes and reach respondents over your preferred channel or embedded chat. We guide the exchange, follow up automatically, and return clean structured data without extra work from your team. Forms power billions of business interactions yearly. Whether it’s forms for client intake, registrations, compliance, feedback, or surveys, they all follow the same painful pattern: low conversion, messy data, and frustrated users. Teams have long tolerated forms only because there's been no scalable alternative for collecting structured information from people - until now. Our goal is for RowFlow to become the new default way for how organizations collect user data in an AI-first world.

name: TectoAI
one_liner: A Platform for AI Governance
long_description: Roksana is Cofounder and CTO of TectoAI, the HR system for AI agents. She holds a Master’s in Computer Science and spent 6+ years at Google building ML features in Gmail, shipping to hundreds of millions of users. She specializes in deploying AI safely at scale, with deep experience in real-time systems, data sensitivity, and edge-case failure.

name: Duranium
one_liner: Reshoring critical metal production
long_description: China and Russia control the world’s critical minerals. We can produce Titanium, Magnesium, Aluminum, Zirconium & Hafnium in the U.S. more profitably than any existing process, and carbon neutrally via co-production. Carbochlorination is the primary process for producing critical metals like titanium, hafnium, and zirconium, and was once the standard for magnesium. The problem: conventional carbochlorination relies on purchasing carbon feedstocks, wastes valuable byproducts, and is highly CO₂-intensive. Duranium changes this with a novel reactor that recycles CO₂ emissions back into feedstock (CO) while generating a valuable co-product (bleaching agents). This closed loop slashes emissions and delivers Chinese-level metal pricing without subsidies — unlocking the full potential of carbochlorination for U.S. critical mineral production.

name: Smartbase
one_liner: AI-native ERP for manufacturers
long_description: Sam (CEO) previously founded a DevOps platform that raised $2M. Taira (CTO) was the youngest SDE 2 at AWS SageMaker Inference, where he built AI infrastructure for enterprises such as Salesforce.

name: Perspectives Health
one_liner: Automating away admin for behavioral health clinics
long_description: My name is Eshan. I’ve spent the last 5 years trying to address what I think is the most pressing problem in the country — addiction and mental health. Before YC, I ran a group doing on the ground overdose prevention work across the country. I also worked at the White House on Drug Policy.

name: Modelence
one_liner: Build production-ready apps with AI
long_description: You built the demo in a weekend. Now you need auth, a prod-grade database, real-time events, AI observability, cron jobs, email, monitoring… and you needed them yesterday. We spent a decade at our previous startup, building a $500M platform while scaling to millions of users and customers like Meta & Netflix. Now we're standardizing how web applications are built with an open-source framework and AI App Builder, so non developers can build reliable production apps and not just prototypes. Modelence is a batteries-included platform with a dedicated web app framework that's designed for building production grade apps with AI, abstracting away the standard building blocks: - Authentication - Database - Hosting - AI integration - Cron jobs - Live / real-time data - Email integration - Monitoring Most AI app builders just stitch together multiple services and existing frameworks. The reliability drops hard because integrations between different parts break. Modelence defines a single full-stack framework with dedicated cloud infrastructure, where these integrations are already built into the framework and don't need to be built for every app.

name: Magnetic
one_liner: AI Tax Preparer for CPA firms
long_description: Magnetic scans client documents - from handwritten charity notes to excel spreadsheet Schedule Cs to multi-state K-1s - and enters them into tax software automatically, saving hours of tedious data entry. The accounting profession is facing a massive talent shortage, as graduates choose different professions and the old guard begins to retire. As a result, CPA and tax preparation firms are awash in clientele, but unable to keep up. At many firms, phones go unanswered, clients are "fired", and websites are taken down, as the existing workforce tries to handle the grueling 80 hour+ weeks necessary to push through tax season to the April 15th deadline. We built this because a former colleague who owns her own tax firm asked us to automate her workload, and we quickly realized the massive opportunity. Thomas brings deep domain expertise as the former Head of Product at Keeper (YC W19), where he built tax engine automation systems and an OCR form scanning system that outperformed everything else on the market. At Keeper, he leveraged early access to OpenAI's LLMs (well before ChatGPT) to build systems that automated the entire tax filing process, allowing a tiny team of CPAs to process thousands of returns with near zero busy work. Patrick was the first engineer at FunCraft, shipping multiple mobile games with 1M+ downloads and building scalable shared codebases. We've worked together since 2017, including co-leading multiple teams at Zynga as PM & Tech Lead respectively. The opportunity is massive - there are 80M US personal tax returns filed via professionals annually, in a $2B outsourcing market where individual CPA firms currently pay $100k-$1M per year for inferior services.
